title: prostanthera stenophylla
intro: Prostanthera stenophylla, commonly known as the narrow leaf mint bush, is a shrub native to Western Australia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains camphor, borneol, and linalool, offering anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial benefits. The health benefits of Prostanthera stenophylla include relief from respiratory issues, such as colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve mood. Prostanthera stenophylla can be prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, or made into a tea, or infused in a carrier oil for topical application.
